cards.name: `DialogContent` requires a `DialogTitle` for the component to be accessible for screen reader users.  If you want to hide the `DialogTitle`, you can wrap it with our VisuallyHidden component.  For more information, see https://radix-ui.com/primitives/docs/components/dialog
cards.desc: Fixed in commit e1a3124: GlobalSearchModal now embeds sr-only DialogTitle/Description (cmdk label prop only sets aria-label, Radix still requires Title).
